message:
fix: CoW allocator switching for WASM/AOT isolation

- CoW allocator now switches between different AOT module images
- Disable CoW for WASM modules (use regular malloc)
- Double-fork daemon for gtimeout signal isolation
- Add daemon stderr logging to /tmp/edgebox-daemon.log
- Remove dead runBinaryMode code (~350 lines)

Fixes WASM benchmark empty output by ensuring WASM modules
don't use CoW memory mapped from AOT images.
